text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, August 04. No work meetings today. You have Sarah wanting to work on her design course and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Yum, that sounds delicious! Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Let's get that resolved. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan's team played a match and won 4-3! Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading a new book before bed. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Yum, that sounds delicious! Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Good call on checking that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. I've got the schedule covered. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
